scripts.build: python scripts/generate-brand-logo.py && python scripts/finalize-tauri-icons.py && python scripts/generate-installer-branding.py && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.icons:refresh: python scripts/generate-brand-logo.py && python scripts/finalize-tauri-icons.py && python scripts/generate-installer-branding.py
scripts.mock:test: npm run quality:catalog:check && npm run typecheck && npm run build && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --lib
scripts.test:quick: npm run test:guard && npm run release:guard && npm run typecheck
